headline: The “Dead” Phone Company Nvidia Just Bet $1 Billion On
summary: Nokia went from ruling the cellphone world to basically disappearing from the conversation. So why did Nvidia just drop $1B on them? *Want to find out the 7 brands that fell and came back? Read more here:* In this video, we unpack how Nokia pulled off one of the wildest business pivots in tech going from RIP Nokia to a $20B networks powerhouse sitting in the middle of the 5G (and soon 6G) arms race. Heres what we get into: - How phones like the Nokia 6110 and indestructible 3310 turned Nokia into a global icon - How Symbian, delay-riddled launches, and the failed iPhone killer N97 almost sank the company - How a forgotten networks division and a fat patent portfolio quietly became Nokias lifeboat - Why buying Bell Labs and AlcatelLucent set Nokia up to win in telecom hardware - Why Nvidia needs Nokias tech to plug AI directly into mobile networks 0:00 Intro 0:31 The Innovator 2:08 The Indestructible 3:35 Losing The Kingdom 6:34 A New Future Subscribe to The Hustle: Get the 5-minute newsletter keeping 2M+ innovators in the loop About HubSpot: HubSpot is a customer platform that provides education, software, and support to help businesses grow better. The platform includes marketing, sales, service, commerce, operations, and website management products that start free and scale to meet our customers needs at any stage of growth. Today, thousands of customers around the world use HubSpots powerful and easy-to-use tools and apps to attract, engage, and delight customers. #TheHustle #HubSpot
